task_completion.description: Verify that the required bookmark folders have been created in Chrome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) showing the folders: 'Avalanche & Weather', 'Medical Protocols', 'Operations', and 'Off-Duty Media'.

task_completion.description: Verify that bookmarks have been moved into their respective folders, particularly quarantining recreational sites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of the bookmark folders, specifically verifying that distracting/recreational sites are placed inside the 'Off-Duty Media' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the multi-tab startup routine is configured for morning avalanche briefings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/onStartup) showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, with 'avalanche.org', 'mesowest.utah.edu', and 'weather.gov' listed as the startup pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that strict 'clear-on-exit' privacy settings are enabled to prevent stale telemetry caching.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/cookies or chrome://settings/content/siteData) showing the option to 'Clear cookies and site data when you close all windows' (or 'Delete data sites have saved to your device when you close all windows') toggled ON.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Chrome download directory has been updated to the incident reports folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the 'Location' field set to a path ending in 'Incident_Reports'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to change settings rather than modifying JSON preference files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the actual chrome://settings pages.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome Bookmark Manager or UI to organize bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the chrome://bookmarks page or the bookmarks bar being actively clicked and dragged, rather than terminal commands editing the Bookmarks file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser and didn't just read the specification text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the Chrome browser window with rendered web pages or settings menus, not just a text editor or terminal window open to the spec file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected bookmark folders are exactly: 'Avalanche & Weather', 'Medical Protocols', 'Operations', and 'Off-Duty Media'. The startup URLs must include 'avalanche.org', 'mesowest.utah.edu', and 'weather.gov'. The Chrome download directory must be set to a folder named 'Incident_Reports'.
